title: CantonReport
description: Per-canton drought assessment output written to data/processed/cantons/{canton_id}.json. Embedded region objects in 'regions' must each conform to the RegionReport schema.

data_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 datetime of the source dataset

regions.description: Per-region reports for all warning regions within this canton. Each item must conform to the RegionReport schema.

max_warnlevel.description: Maximum warning level across all regions in the canton (1–5)

max_warnlevel_info_de.description: German warning level text for the region with the highest warning level

max_warnlevel_info_fr.description: French warning level text for the region with the highest warning level

n_regions_by_precip_index.description: Count of regions per precipitation index level. Keys are index levels (as strings); values are counts.

n_regions_by_soil_moisture_index.description: Count of regions per soil moisture index level. Keys are index levels (as strings); values are counts.

n_regions_by_hydro_index.description: Count of regions per hydrological index level. Keys are index levels (as strings); values are counts.

quality.description: Aggregated data quality assessment across all regions

n_regions_dry.description: Number of regions with CDI ≥ cdi.dry_min

cdi_min_dry.description: Minimum CDI across dry regions; null if no dry regions

cdi_max_dry.description: Maximum CDI across dry regions; null if no dry regions

cdi_situation_delta.description: Difference between sum of week-2 CDI forecasts and sum of current CDI values across regions

mean_precip_sum_1m.description: Mean 1-month precipitation sum across regions (mm); null if all region values are unavailable

mean_precip_sum_3m.description: Mean 3-month precipitation sum across regions (mm); null if all region values are unavailable

precip_index_min.description: Minimum precipitation index across all regions (1–5)

precip_index_max.description: Maximum precipitation index across all regions (1–5)

n_regions_with_precip_deficit.description: Number of regions with precipitation index ≥ indicator_deficits.precip_1m_index_min

n_regions_with_soil_moisture_deficit.description: Number of regions with soil moisture index ≥ indicator_deficits.soil_moisture_index_min

n_regions_with_vhi_stress.description: Number of regions with vhi_index ≥ vhi.stress_index_min

max_vhi_index.description: Maximum VHI stress index across all regions in the canton (1–5)

discharge.description: Aggregated discharge station summary across all regions in the canton
